segments.scene_description: A static, atmospheric view of a gothic-style common room with stone archways and warm lantern lighting. NPCs are seated around a central wooden table in the middle of the room, while the camera maintains a fixed elevated perspective overlooking the scene. The environment features ornate architectural details including wall emblems and wooden benches along the sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a dimly lit gothic common room that emphasizes a moody and scholarly environment. It begins with an elevated view overlooking a central wooden table where NPCs are seated in quiet conversation. The camera captures the interplay between the deep shadows of the stone archways and the warm, flickering glow of lantern lighting. This fixed gaze then lingers on the ornate architectural details, drawing attention to the wall emblems and wooden benches that line the perimeter of the room.
